name: New York Style Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and press into a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Combine salt, sugar, eggs, and lemon juice in a large bowl and beat until smooth.
3. Add the cream cheese, one package at a time, and beat until smooth.
4. Gradually add the egg mixture and beat until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared springform pan and bake at 350°F for about 1 hour. Place foil under the pan to catch drippings.
6. Spread the sour cream and sugar topping over the cheesecake.
7. Bake at 475°F for 15-20 minutes.
8. Refrigerate for at least one hour before serving. Top with cherry or blueberry pie filling if desired.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers, do not use aggressive culinary terms like "kill the heat," "smash," "destroy," "burn," "splutter," or "execute."
